Metadata.title: Certo Governance Institute
Metadata.description: An independent rating agency assessing the quality of governance in the public, corporate, medical, and defense sectors.

Home.title: Certo Governance Institute
Home.description: Certo is the world's first rating agency whose ratings are cryptographic artifacts of the process — not opinions. Every rating decision is anchored outside its own infrastructure, verifiable offline, and publicly auditable.

About.title: About Certo Governance Institute
About.mission_text: Building a culture of good governance through independent assessment and promotion of governance standards in Poland and Europe.
About.independence_text: The Foundation is independent from the institutions being assessed, public authorities, and commercial interests.
About.methodology_text: Certo Ratings are based on rigorous methodology rooted in ISO standards and EU guidelines.

Contact.title: Contact
